cta.headline: Ready for a Spotless Home?

servicesPage.intro: From quick touch-ups to deep cleans, Reyes Maids offers a full range of house cleaning services in Dallas. Choose the plan that fits your lifestyle.

services.title: Standard Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Regular maintenance to keep your home fresh and tidy.
services.longDescription: Our standard cleaning covers all the essentials – dusting, vacuuming, mopping, kitchen and bathroom sanitation – leaving your home consistently clean.

process.title: Walkthrough
process.description: We review your priorities and any special instructions.

process.title: Clean
process.description: Our team systematically cleans each room using our checklist.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: A final walkthrough ensures every detail meets our standards.

faqs.question: How long does a standard cleaning take?
faqs.answer: Typically 2-3 hours depending on home size.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home?
faqs.answer: Not at all – we can use a lockbox or key code.

services.title: Deep Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Intensive cleaning for neglected areas and tough grime.
services.longDescription: Our deep cleaning goes beyond the surface to tackle built-up dirt, grime, and allergens. Perfect for move-ins, move-outs, or seasonal refreshes.
benefits: Blinds, light fixtures, and window sills
All vents and ceiling fans cleaned

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We identify high-priority areas needing extra attention.

process.title: Deep Scrub
process.description: Using specialized tools and eco-friendly products to remove grime.

process.title: Final Polish
process.description: Every surface is wiped and polished for a like-new finish.

faqs.question: How often should I get a deep clean?
faqs.answer: We recommend every 3-6 months for optimal home hygiene.

faqs.question: Does deep cleaning include windows?
faqs.answer: Yes, interior windows and sills are included.

services.title: Move-In/Move-Out Cleaning
services.longDescription: Make your move easier with a thorough cleaning that leaves the old home spotless for the next owner and your new home fresh for you.
benefits: Full deep clean of entire home
All floors, walls, and trim detailed
Refrigerator and oven cleaned inside and out

process.title: Pre-Move Walkthrough
process.description: We note specific areas to focus on for your move.

process.title: Full Clean
process.description: Every corner is cleaned, from baseboards to ceiling fans.

process.title: Final Touch
process.description: We ensure no spots are missed and leave the home move-in ready.

faqs.question: Can you clean on moving day?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can work around your schedule – even same-day service.

faqs.question: Do you clean the garage too?
faqs.answer: Absolutely, it can be added for an additional fee.

services.title: Eco-Friendly Green Cleaning
services.longDescription: Our green cleaning service uses plant-based, biodegradable products that are safe for your family, pets, and the environment – without sacrificing effectiveness.

process.title: Product Selection
process.description: We choose from our certified green product line.

process.title: Green Clean
process.description: Microfiber cloths and HEPA vacuums trap allergens, not spread them.

process.title: Eco Check
process.description: We confirm all waste is disposed of responsibly.

faqs.question: Are your green products as effective?
faqs.answer: Yes – they meet or exceed conventional cleaners in lab tests.

faqs.question: Do you charge extra for green cleaning?
faqs.answer: No, it’s included at no additional cost.

about.headline: About Reyes Maids – Your Local Cleaning Partner
about.mission: To provide Dallas families with a healthier, cleaner home through reliable, eco-friendly cleaning services that exceed expectations.
story: Reyes Maids was founded in 2014 by Maria Reyes, a Dallas native who saw the need for trustworthy, high-quality house cleaning in her community. Starting with just a bucket and a dream, she built a team of dedicated professionals who share her passion for cleanliness and customer care. Today, Reyes Maids is part of Monarca Home Services, serving hundreds of homes across Dallas with the same personal touch that started it all.

We believe that a clean home is the foundation of a happy life. That’s why we invest in training, eco-friendly products, and a satisfaction guarantee. Every cleaner is bonded, insured, and background-checked – because your trust is our most valuable asset.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say – on time, every time.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: No shortcuts, just meticulous attention to detail.

coreValues.title: Sustainability
coreValues.description: Protecting your home and the planet with green practices.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: Proudly serving and supporting our Dallas neighbors.
